description: Volkswagen Tiguan Highline R-Line 4MOTION The 2024 Volkswagen Tiguan Highline R-Line 4MOTION blends premium refinement with sporty R-Line styling and confident all-wheel drive performance. Designed for drivers who want luxury, technology and versatility in one SUV, the Tiguan Highline delivers comfort in every season. Key Features & Highlights Engine: 2.0L TSI Turbocharged 4-cylinder Drivetrain: 4MOTION All-Wheel Drive Transmission: 8-speed automatic R-Line Package: Sport exterior styling, unique bumpers and wheels Interior: Leather seating surfaces with ventilated and heated front seats Infotainment: Large touchscreen with navigation, Apple CarPlay & Android Auto Digital Cockpit Pro: Fully digital driver display Panoramic Sunroof: Expansive glass roof for added light and style Safety: IQ.DRIVE driver assistance suite Why Choose the 2024 Tiguan Highline R-Line? Premium SUV feel with sporty R-Line design Confident AWD performance for Canadian weather Advanced technology and digital displays Comfortable, refined interior with upscale finishes Perfect balance of family practicality and executive styling A bold, well-equipped SUV that delivers performance, comfort and everyday versatility in one premium package.

description: 2026 Volkswagen Tiguan Trendline 4MOTION The 2026 Volkswagen Tiguan Trendline 4MOTION combines versatility, confidence and modern technology in a stylish compact SUV. Equipped with Volkswagen’s renowned 4MOTION All-Wheel Drive system, the Tiguan is built to handle Canadian roads and changing weather conditions with ease. Key Features & Highlights Engine: Turbocharged 4-cylinder performance Drivetrain: 4MOTION All-Wheel Drive Transmission: Automatic Interior: Comfortable 5-passenger seating with flexible cargo space Infotainment: Touchscreen display with Apple CarPlay & Android Auto Safety: Advanced driver assistance and safety technologies Comfort: Climate control and thoughtfully designed cabin layout Cargo Space: Spacious rear cargo area with folding rear seats Exterior: Modern Volkswagen SUV styling with confident road presence Why Choose the 2026 Tiguan Trendline 4MOTION? Confident AWD performance for all seasons Comfortable and practical interior for everyday use Modern technology and connectivity features Versatile cargo space for family life and travel Excellent balance of efficiency, capability and value A capable and well-equipped SUV designed to keep you comfortable and confident wherever the road takes you.
